D1-27e8ca7b.decision: All network calls must use the apiClient wrapper instead of direct fetch() calls
D1-27e8ca7b.rationale: Ensures retry logic and authentication headers are always applied, preventing outages caused by bypassing these mechanisms
D1-27e8ca7b.scope: src/lib/apiClient.ts, all source files making HTTP requests (e.g., *.ts, *.js under src/)

D2-7b3d4140.decision: Cache layer must be Redis; never use in-memory Map caches; always use cacheGet/cacheSet
D2-7b3d4140.rationale: In‑process caches cause stale data across multiple instances, which led to the Mar 2 stale‑config incident. Using Redis provides a single source of truth for all instances.
D2-7b3d4140.scope: src/lib/cache.ts, any code that accesses caching

D3-78840811.decision: Do not simplify or refactor the LEGACY_LINE regex in src/utils/legacyRegex.ts
D3-78840811.rationale: The regex's alternation handles a legacy customer format (Acme Corp) that escapes delimiters differently; simplifying it breaks those imports silently.

D4-6f2ef5f1.decision: All logging must go through src/lib/logger.ts and never use console.log in application code
D4-6f2ef5f1.rationale: Structured JSON logs are required for log‑aggregator alerts; unstructured console.log entries broke alerts on May 9, so using the shared logger ensures consistent log shape.
